tex:
On a map, a lake has an area of $32\,\text{cm}^2$.
\newline
\\
The scale of the map is $1 : 24\,000$.
\newline

Calculate the actual area of the lake.
\newline
\\
Give your answer in km$^2$.
\newline

Give your answer in km$^2$.
